title: antidesma alexiteria
intro: Antidesma alexiteria, commonly known as the "alexiteric plant" or "tiger's eye", is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of white blood cells and enhance the immune system. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Antidesma alexiteria include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its health benefits.
